summary: Search System Refactor Testing Complete - Backend 22/22 tests passed (100%). All search functionality refactored from AI-generation-based to pure DB-only. Frontend SearchBar correctly handles new response format, input validation, and navigation.

minor.issue: Used 'if not _db:' instead of 'if _db is None:' causing pymongo NotImplementedError

critical_code_review_comments: re.escape() used correctly to prevent regex injection in search queries
Rate limiting implemented: 30 requests per 10 minutes per IP (in-memory)
Input validation: min 2 chars, max 80 chars enforced via Query() parameters
Response format changed from {found, recipe} (single) to {found, recipes[]} (array)
MongoDB indexes created for status+slug, status+recipe_name, status+origin_country, status+average_rating
auto_generate parameter no longer accepted (AI generation removed)
Frontend SearchBar updated to handle array response and navigate to first match
seed_data_creation: Used existing recipe data (161 published recipes)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Search refactor complete. All endpoints tested: GET /api/recipes/search (q min 2, max 80 chars, returns recipes array), GET /api/recipes (search param regex escaped), GET /api/search/suggestions (regex escaped). Rate limiting verified (429 after 30 requests). MongoDB indexes verified: status_1_slug_1, status_1_recipe_name_1, status_1_origin_country_1, status_1_average_rating_-1_ratings_count_-1.
verified_features: GET /api/recipes/search?q=carbonara returns found=true with recipes array
GET /api/recipes/search?q=.* does NOT return all recipes (regex injection blocked)
GET /api/recipes?search=.* does NOT return all recipes (regex injection blocked)
Search endpoint does NOT trigger any OpenAI/AI generation (no auto_generate parameter)
Rate limiting: hitting /api/recipes/search 31+ times rapidly returns 429
Frontend SearchBar shows search results and navigates to recipe on match
Frontend SearchBar shows 'No recipes found' toast when no matches
Frontend SearchBar has maxLength=80 on input
Frontend SearchBar button is disabled when query < 2 chars
MongoDB indexes exist: status_1_slug_1, status_1_recipe_name_1, status_1_origin_country_1, status_1_average_rating_-1_ratings_count_-1

backend_search_api.TestSearchInputValidation: 6/6 passed - min 2 chars (422), max 80 chars accepted, 81 chars (422), empty (422), whitespace handled
backend_search_api.TestSearchResponseFormat: 4/4 passed - carbonara returns array, nonexistent returns suggestion, country match works, pasta returns multiple
backend_search_api.TestSearchRegexInjectionPrevention: 4/4 passed - .* blocked, [a-z] blocked, ^ blocked, GET /api/recipes regex blocked
backend_search_api.TestSearchNoAIGeneration: 2/2 passed - auto_generate ignored, search fast (<2s no AI)
backend_search_api.TestSearchRateLimiting: 2/2 passed - first requests not limited, 429 after threshold
backend_search_api.TestSearchSuggestionsEndpoint: 3/3 passed - min 2 chars, regex blocked, valid query returns suggestions
backend_search_api.TestMongoDBIndexes: 1/1 passed - search performance indicates indexes working

frontend_searchbar_ui.Button disabled < 2 chars: PASS - Button disabled with 1 char query
frontend_searchbar_ui.Button enabled >= 2 chars: PASS - Button enabled with 2+ char query
frontend_searchbar_ui.Search navigation: PASS - Navigates to /recipe/spaghetti-alla-carbonara-italy on carbonara search
frontend_searchbar_ui.No results toast: PASS - 'No recipes found' toast shown for nonexistent query
frontend_searchbar_ui.Stay on homepage: PASS - Does not navigate when no results

fixes_applied./app/backend/routes/search.py line 83: Changed 'if not _db:' to 'if _db is None:' to fix pymongo NotImplementedError on bool check
